title: Marketing My Own Templates as a Sales Package for Customers
excerpt:

posts.author: WeUnifyLegal (Cynthia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I want to offer the templates I’ve created in my own Monday.com account as part of a package to market to my clients. A few questions:

  1. In the Contract I have with Monday.com, am I able to market these templates?
  2. Is there a way for my clients to easily import my pre-completed templates?
  3. I would be directing sales to Monday.com, as my clients would have to pay for a subscription, is there a referral discount or something I can work into it?

I know that the developer I hired to set up my Monday.com account did something similar by importing his pre-completed templates to my Monday.com account and charging me for that, but I just want to cover logistics.

Thank you!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @WeUnifyLegal! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
